since_last: 35% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.57%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.50% · BTC -0.59% · Gold +0.41% · Nasdaq100 -1.12%. 35% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.57%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.57%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -10.61%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +4.34%, LEU +3.26%, ZS +3.07%, PANW +2.93%, OKTA +2.61%. Laggards: ISRG -10.61%, META -4.66%, UPST -4.47%, PUBM -4.26%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.75% at $126.19
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.75% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
